resultList.dtldesc: Step into the realm of luxurious living with an exceptional opportunity  a stunning 2 BHK Flat For Sale in the prestigious TVS Emerald Peninsula, nestled in the sought-after locality of Manapakkam, Chennai. Property specifications Boasting a super area of 1243 sqft and a carpet area of 800 sqft, this thoughtfully designed residence occupies the 5th floor of an impressive 7-story building, offering captivating panoramic views of the surrounding amenities and landscaped vistas.Anticipated to be ready for possession in September 2024, this under-construction gem comes unfurnished, allowing you the creative freedom to transform it into your dream home. The layout includes 2 comfortable bedrooms, each featuring an attached bathroom. The convenience of 2 western-style bathrooms and provision for geysers ensures modern comfort, while the attached balcony provides a serene space to unwind, overlooking the bustling amenities with a peaceful aura.The living cum dining area is a spacious haven, perfectly blending elegance with functionality. In addition to its appealing features, the apartment includes a well-designed normal kitchen with a sleek granite platform and sink. A piped gas connection adds convenience to your culinary endeavors, while an attached utility area enhances practicality.Aesthetics meet practicality with the apartments vitrified flooring, combining elegance with easy maintenance. This property is Vaastu compliant, ensuring a harmonious flow of positive energy throughout the living spaces.The apartments favorable North orientation invites abundant natural light to fill the rooms, creating a cheerful ambiance. The attached balcony provides a peaceful spot to take in the views of the complexs amenities. Facilities Prime facilities such as one covered parking , 24 hours water supply, 100 power backup, security guard along with CCTV cameras, 2 lifts and amenities such as power back up, club house, swimming pool, gymnasium, park,maintenance staff, jogging and strolling track, outdoor tennis courts, mini cinema theater, health club with steam  jacuzzi, multipurpose hall, solar energy, aerobics room etc are available Locality Nestled behind the prestigious DLF Tech Park, this prime locale combines modern living with unparalleled convenience. Within a 5km radius, youll find reputed schools, top-notch hospitals, and a range of malls and supermarkets, catering to every aspect of your lifestyle.Public transport is readily available, ensuring hassle-free commuting, while a network of banks and ATMs adds to your everyday ease. The Chennai Central Railway Station, a mere 11km away, connects you to the citys heartbeat. Excitingly, an upcoming metro station at just 2km promises to enhance your connectivity even further.

resultList.dtldesc: Discover contemporary living in one of Chennai’s most sought-after residential neighbourhoods with this thoughtfully designed 3 BHK apartment in West Mambalam. Located on Raju Street, a prime and well-connected stretch, this property combines modern construction quality with everyday convenience, making it an excellent choice for families as well as discerning investors.::::Property Specifications::Spanning a generous super built-up area of 1554 sq. ft, this under-construction apartment is situated on the 2nd floor of a low-rise building with a total of 3 floors, ensuring a peaceful and less crowded living environment. The apartment is unfurnished, offering complete flexibility to design interiors as per personal taste and lifestyle needs. It is a south-facing home, planned with Vaastu compliance in mind, enhancing both comfort and positive spatial flow. The layout is designed to maximise usable space and ventilation, while the property overlooks a 40 ft wide main road, ensuring excellent accessibility. Built using durable red brick construction and as per approved plans, the project ensures quality and reliability. Additionally, the property comes with 41 UDS (Undivided Share of Land), adding to its long-term value.::::Facilities::This residence is equipped with a host of modern amenities that elevate daily living. Residents benefit from DG power backup for both common areas and the apartment, ensuring uninterrupted functionality. Solar power support for common areas adds an eco-friendly advantage. The building features an OTIS stainless steel 6-passenger lift that extends up to the terrace, along with automated gates for enhanced security and convenience. CCTV surveillance and a video door phone (VDP) system in the lobby provide added safety. A standout feature is the provision of individual EV charging points for each parking space, catering to future-ready living. The rooftop sit-out area offers a relaxing space for residents to unwind and socialise.::::Locality::West Mambalam is a well-established residential locality in Chennai, known for its excellent connectivity and vibrant community. The property’s location on Raju Street ensures proximity to key amenities such as reputed schools, healthcare facilities, supermarkets, and local markets. The area is well-served by public transport, including railway stations and bus networks, making daily commuting convenient. Its central location provides easy access to major commercial and cultural hubs of the city. With a blend of traditional charm and modern infrastructure, West Mambalam continues to be a preferred choice for homebuyers seeking both comfort and long-term value.
